name: CTA Carotid Arteries
description: CT angiography of the carotid arteries for stroke and stenosis evaluation

findings.technique: CT angiography of the neck and intracranial vessels was performed following intravenous contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Internal Carotid Arteries
sections.content: Right ICA: [no stenosis / no plaque]. Left ICA: [no stenosis / no plaque]. No dissection.

sections.name: External Carotid Arteries
sections.content: External carotid arteries [are patent / normal] bilaterally.

sections.name: Vertebral Arteries
sections.content: Vertebral arteries [are patent / no stenosis] bilaterally.

impression:
1. No significant carotid stenosis.
2. No vertebral artery stenosis.
3. Normal carotid CTA.
